capability_formalizations.subject_kind: rev ops manager or sales leader
capability_formalizations.summary: Prepare an approval-gated routing preview for scored or hot leads in a named cohort; outreach drafting is not supported by this capability.
capability_formalizations.title: route_leads

implementation_fit.rationale: ANIP can expose and govern this capability, but the service still needs domain/backend implementation logic.

capability_formalizations.summary: Draft a bounded outreach message for a selected target and explicit objective; send actions and raw transcripts are not supported.
capability_formalizations.title: draft_outreach_message

implementation_fit.rationale: ANIP can expose and govern this capability, but the service still needs domain/backend implementation logic.

capability_formalizations.summary: Return bounded follow-up content variants for an explicit GTM target.
capability_formalizations.title: suggest_followup_content

implementation_fit.rationale: ANIP can expose and govern this capability, but the service still needs domain/backend implementation logic.

inputs.summary: Named objection theme. Use competitor for competitor objections.

capability_formalizations.summary: Return bounded objection-response variants for a selected competitor or concern.
capability_formalizations.title: objection_response_variants

implementation_fit.rationale: ANIP can expose and govern this capability, but the service still needs domain/backend implementation logic.

inputs.summary: Specific account selected from the bottleneck review

capability_formalizations.summary: Draft outreach only for a specific account already selected from a bounded bottleneck or at-risk account review. Do not use this capability to choose the top or affected account from analysis; use the approval-gated follow-up preparation flow for derived-target bottleneck or at-risk requests.
capability_formalizations.title: bottleneck_account_outreach_draft

implementation_fit.rationale: ANIP can expose and govern this capability, but the service still needs domain/backend implementation logic.

inputs.summary: Account cohort to prioritize, such as expansion_candidates_q2
Maximum accounts to consider before drafting

capability_formalizations.summary: Prioritize a bounded account cohort, include bounded enrichment context for the top accounts, and draft one outreach message for the highest-priority account; this is for prioritization-to-enrichment-to-draft requests, not lead routing.
capability_formalizations.title: prioritized_outreach_draft

implementation_fit.rationale: Represented as a declared contract-level composed business capability. Child handlers may still require service implementation.

capability_formalizations.summary: Compose gtm.account_risk_summary -> gtm.prepare_followup_tasks when the requested business action needs derived targets before governed preparation.
capability_formalizations.title: Gtm.At Risk Followup Preparation

implementation_fit.rationale: Represented as a declared contract-level composed business capability. Child handlers may still require service implementation.

implementation_fit.rationale: Represented as a declared contract-level composed business capability. Child handlers may still require service implementation.

permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: sales_analyst allowed access to Outreach Drafting should return direct_result. Return bounded read results for in-scope pipeline, enrichment, prioritization, or outreach-draft requests. Use only after actor and business-area vocabularies are confirmed. Studio mapped assistant actor reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing actor "sales_analyst". Studio mapped assistant business-area reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing business area "outreach_drafting".
permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Return bounded read results for in-scope pipeline, enrichment, prioritization, or outreach-draft requests.

permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: sales_leader bounded access to Pipeline Insight should return masked_or_restricted_result. Return a narrowed or masked result when the actor can see the shape of the data but not the full scope or values. Applies to partial visibility cases described in the forecast, bottleneck, team performance, and product pipeline specs. Studio mapped assistant actor reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing actor "sales_leader". Studio mapped assistant business-area reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing business area "pipeline_insight".
permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Return a narrowed or masked result when the actor can see the shape of the data but not the full scope or values.

permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: account_manager_east restricted access to Governance and Approvals should return masked_or_restricted_result. Restrict the requested region, ownership boundary, or slice when the actor is outside the allowed scope. Use for actor-aware regional or ownership boundaries. Studio mapped assistant actor reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing actor "account_manager_east". Studio mapped assistant business-area reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing business area "governance_and_approvals".
permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Restrict the requested region, ownership boundary, or slice when the actor is outside the allowed scope.

permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: sales_analyst denied access to Account Enrichment should return deny_request. Deny raw export, direct-send, unsupported analysis, or other out-of-scope requests instead of improvising unsafe behavior. Covers raw CRM export, raw model-feature dumps, raw transcripts, and direct-send outreach. Studio mapped assistant actor reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing actor "sales_analyst". Studio mapped assistant business-area reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing business area "account_enrichment".
permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Deny raw export, direct-send, unsupported analysis, or other out-of-scope requests instead of improvising unsafe behavior.

permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: rev_ops_manager approval_required access to Prioritization and Routing should return approval_stop. Prepare the operational preview, then stop before routing, reassignment, follow-up execution, or any downstream mutation. Applies to lead routing, reassignment previews, and follow-up task preparation. Studio mapped assistant actor reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing actor "rev_ops_manager". Studio mapped assistant business-area reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing business area "prioritization_and_routing".
permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Prepare the operational preview, then stop before routing, reassignment, follow-up execution, or any downstream mutation.

permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: account_manager_east allowed access to Prioritization and Routing should return clarification_required. Ask for missing quarter, account reference, cohort, ranking basis, target, or other critical input instead of guessing. Use when required parameters are missing from the request. Studio mapped assistant actor reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing actor "account_manager_east". Studio mapped assistant business-area reference "<requires_clarification>" to existing business area "prioritization_and_routing".
permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Ask for missing quarter, account reference, cohort, ranking basis, target, or other critical input instead of guessing.
